inputs.requiredFields: "{\"requiredFields\":[{\"field\":\"Paystub Identification Number\",\"section\":\"General\",\"description\":\"Unique identifier for the paystub\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.85},{\"field\":\"Pay Date\",\"section\":\"General\",\"description\":\"Date when the payment was made\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.9},{\"field\":\"Net Pay\",\"section\":\"General\",\"description\":\"Total amount paid to the employee after deductions\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.9},{\"field\":\"Employee Name\",\"section\":\"Employee Information\",\"description\":\"Full name of the employee\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.9},{\"field\":\"SSN\",\"section\":\"Employee Information\",\"description\":\"Social Security Number used to uniquely identify the employee\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.85},{\"field\":\"Employer Name\",\"section\":\"Employer Information\",\"description\":\"Name of the company issuing the paystub\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.85},{\"field\":\"Earnings Type\",\"section\":\"Earnings Table\",\"description\":\"Type of earnings (e.g. Salary, Bonus)\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.85},{\"field\":\"Earnings This Period\",\"section\":\"Earnings Table\",\"description\":\"Amount earned during this period\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.85},{\"field\":\"Gross Earnings YTD\",\"section\":\"Earnings Table\",\"description\":\"Cumulative earnings from start of year\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.8},{\"field\":\"Deduction Type\",\"section\":\"Deductions Table\",\"description\":\"Name of the deduction (e.g. 401k, Medical)\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.8},{\"field\":\"Deductions This Period\",\"section\":\"Deductions Table\",\"description\":\"Amount deducted in this pay period\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.85},{\"field\":\"Tax Type\",\"section\":\"Taxes Table\",\"description\":\"Type of tax withheld\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.8},{\"field\":\"Tax This Period\",\"section\":\"Taxes Table\",\"description\":\"Tax amount deducted in this period\",\"confidenceThreshold\":0.85}]}"
